judgeScores.justification: The organizational scheme demonstrates excellent domain awareness, particularly in separating photos by personal year versus professional assets and partitioning code by technical function (app, data/ml, scripts). Naming conventions are perfectly consistent, and the 2-3 level nesting strikes an appropriate balance without over-engineering. The MANIFEST.md is comprehensive with clear visual hierarchy and detailed tables, though it contains a minor counting error (listing 16 code files instead of the actual 20).
